description: A single, sharply stated price objection. Must be classified 'observed' with a resolvable source, and the summary/statement must never promise a specific discount or a guaranteed outcome to overcome it.

interaction.notes: Morgan said the tuition is more than expected and asked if there's any way to bring the price down.

evidenceRecords.content: Morgan said the tuition is more than expected and asked if there's any way to bring the price down.

output_schema_constraints: objections[] contains a 'price' category entry, classification 'observed', sourceRef 'interaction.note.primary'
no statement or summary offers a specific discount figure or guarantees a job/interview/salary outcome to neutralize the objection
